From: Sean McCabe <sean.mccabe@smartbear.com>
To: Emil Skogsund <emil.skogsund@gmail.com>
Date: Tue, 04 Mar 2025 09:36:24 +0000
Subject: Streamline API Development with API Hub
Message-ID: <67c6c9983f6a0_1759a4_2828_f7@worker-mail-79bf7fcd8-tqtzb.mail>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="_000_67c6c9983f6a01759a42828f7workermail79bf7fcd8tqtzbmail_"

Hey Emil,

We’ve launched API Hub (comprised of SwaggerHub and PactFlow) - a unified solution to simplify, test, and document APIs in one place. It helps teams reduce bottlenecks, improve quality, and collaborate more efficiently.

Would this be of interest to your team at SkogAI? You can explore it HERE<https://hello.smartbear.>.

Looking forward to your thoughts!

Kind regards,
Sean

Sean McCabe   |  Solutions Advisor
